dave.name: Dave
dave.description: Mid-30s, friendly but competitive, warm baritone. Speaks casually — your golf buddy. Not trying too hard. Genuine laughs, real reactions.

narrator.name: Narrator
narrator.description: Calm, literary, wry. Like a golf documentary narrator who actually has a sense of humor. Not booming — intimate, close-mic. Think a podcast voice, not a stadium voice.

inner_voice.name: Inner Voice
inner_voice.description: Your own thoughts. Slightly anxious, slightly sarcastic. Faster paced than the narrator. More intimate — like talking to yourself in your head. Occasional self-doubt, occasional confidence.

announcer.name: Clubhouse Announcer
announcer.description: PA system voice. Slightly muffled, authoritative but bored. Used for multiplayer lobby announcements and hole transitions.
